string.name: what_s_new_latest
string.font:
🌟 Themed Icon Support: Added monochrome launcher icon for Android 13+ themed icons. 
🌟 Localization Updates: Refined Spanish translations and streamlined Russian/Portuguese resources. 
🌟 Dependency Updates: Updated AGP to 9.2.1 and core Compose libraries to latest stable versions. 
🌟 Performance & Stability: Minor cleanup and optimizations for a smoother experience.
